global_rules: Follow mobile-first layout rules rigorously. Constrain max-width on desktop to simulate app experience if needed, or scale UI appropriately.
No generic flat colors. Use noise/grain overlays and intense lighting contrasts.
Avoid Bootstrap/Vercel standard looks. Use heavy stylization on inputs and buttons.
Use deep 'Void Black' base, do not use flat #000000 without texture.
Apply optical clarity glassmorphism for overlays.

glassmorphism.usage: Overlays, sticky headers, NPC dialogue boxes

retro_terminal.usage: Combat screens, hacking interfaces, skill trees

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-brand-primary text-brand-primary hover:bg-brand-primary hover:text-[#030305] transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-accent_purple text-accent_purple hover:bg-accent_purple hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm
buttons.terminal_action: bg-success_green text-black uppercase tracking-widest text-sm hover:brightness-110

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0F] border-b-2 border-brand-primary/30 focus:border-brand-primary text-brand-primary outline-none transition-colors rounded-none placeholder-brand-primary/30

cards.dashboard: bg-[#0A0A0F] border border-white/5 hover:border-brand-primary/30 transition-all p-4 md:p-6 relative overflow-hidden

npc_dialogue.container: fixed bottom-4 left-4 right-4 md:left-1/4 md:right-1/4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-accent_purple/50 p-6 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(157,0,255,0.15)] z-50

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must shift visually. Borders glow, backgrounds fill, text colors invert.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Fast fade-in with a subtle glitch effect.
motion_and_interactions.list_stagger: Fade and slide up 10px, staggered by 50ms.
motion_and_interactions.combat_hit: Screen shake / subtle red flash border.

image_urls.description: Nexus City map background or Login screen background.
Male elite hacker avatar, green visor.
Female cyberpunk operative avatar, purple lighting.

login_register.layout: Centered form over 'nexus-city' background with heavy black/50 and backdrop-blur. Terminal-style text typing effect for welcome message.
login_register.elements: Glitchy logo, inputs with only bottom borders, intense glowing primary button.

character_creation.layout: Carousel of avatars. Class selection uses the 'Bento Grid' strategy. Each class card glows with a specific neon color upon selection.
character_creation.elements: Radar chart for stats (Offense, Defense, Stealth). CRT scanline overlay on avatars.

dashboard_hud.layout: 'Control Room' grid. Tight spacing (gap-4). Modular panels.
dashboard_hud.elements: Top bar: Level, XP Progress (neon green bar), Coins. Main area: Current active mission card (large). Right/Bottom: Inventory summary, daily challenges list. No rounded corners, sharp technical UI.

story_mode_map.layout: Nodes connected by glowing paths (SVG lines). Unlocked nodes glow blue, locked nodes are dim grey, current node pulses purple.
story_mode_map.elements: Background map graphics. 'Start Mission' modal slides in from right.

npc_dialogue.layout: Visual novel style. Character portrait on the left/right. Bottom heavy glassmorphic text box. Dialogue text types out.
npc_dialogue.elements: Branching choice buttons stacked vertically above the dialogue box. Hovering a choice turns it solid neon.

cyber_combat.layout: Split screen or top-bottom turn-based RPG style. Enemy (AI/Server) at top, Player HUD at bottom.
cyber_combat.elements: Action menu: [Exploits, Firewalls, Malware, Run]. Health bars are styled as 'System Integrity' percentages. Attack animations use CSS glitches and flash effects.

inventory.layout: Dense grid of items. Dark grey backgrounds with rarity-colored borders (Common: Gray, Rare: Blue, Epic: Purple, Legendary: Orange).
inventory.elements: Hovering an item shows a tooltip with item lore and stats.

skill_tree.layout: Pan and zoom canvas (or a large scrollable area). Hexagonal or diamond-shaped nodes.
skill_tree.elements: Lines connecting nodes light up when the prerequisite is met. Active nodes have an inner glow.

testing_attributes: All actionable and data-displaying elements must include `data-testid` in kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`, `data-testid="xp-bar"`).
instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React Native and Expo, as this is the actual environment running.
Use NativeWind for Tailwind CSS styling if available, otherwise translate the provided Tailwind classes into React Native StyleSheet objects.
Do not use Shadcn UI directly as it is web-only; instead, build custom React Native components (Views, Text, TouchableOpacity) that mimic the specified 'retro_terminal' and 'glassmorphism' styles.
Implement navigation using Expo Router or React Navigation (Bottom Tabs for main navigation, Stack for combat/story screens).
Do not use generic border-radius. Use square edges or extremely subtle 2px radii to maintain the aggressive cyberpunk aesthetic.
Integrate the provided image URLs perfectly using the React Native <Image /> component.
Load 'Unbounded' and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts using expo-font and ensure they are applied globally via custom Text wrappers.
